tiles.name: Top error signatures (normalized) — click a row to open Logs

config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT ServiceName AS "Service", pattern AS "Signature", count() AS "Count" FROM (
  SELECT ServiceName,
         replaceRegexpAll(replaceRegexpAll(Body, '[0-9a-fA-F-]{8,}', '<id>'), '[0-9]+', '<n>') AS pattern
  FROM {{LOGS_SCHEMA}}.{{LOGS_TABLE}}
  WHERE (SeverityNumber >= 17 OR lower(SeverityText) IN ('error', 'fatal'))
    AND Timestamp >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
    AND Timestamp <= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
    AND $__filters
)
GROUP BY ServiceName, pattern
ORDER BY count() DESC
LIMIT 50

tiles.name: New log patterns in last 24h (vs prior 7d) — click a row to open Logs

config.sqlTemplate:
WITH normalized AS (
  SELECT ServiceName,
         replaceRegexpAll(replaceRegexpAll(Body, '[0-9]+', '<n>'), '[0-9a-fA-F-]{8,}', '<id>') AS pattern,
         Timestamp
  FROM {{LOGS_SCHEMA}}.{{LOGS_TABLE}}
  WHERE (SeverityNumber >= 17 OR lower(SeverityText) IN ('error','fatal')) AND Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 8 DAY AND $__filters
)
SELECT ServiceName, pattern,
       countIf(Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS last_24h,
       countIf(Timestamp <= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS prior_7d
FROM normalized
GROUP BY ServiceName, pattern
HAVING prior_7d = 0 AND last_24h > 0
ORDER BY last_24h DESC
LIMIT 50

tiles.name: Live error stream — click a row for full log detail

config.select: Timestamp, SeverityText, ServiceName, ResourceAttributes['k8s.namespace.name'], ResourceAttributes['k8s.pod.name'], Body

tiles.name: Top error sources (namespace / pod) — click a row to open Logs

config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT ResourceAttributes['k8s.namespace.name'] AS "Namespace", ResourceAttributes['k8s.pod.name'] AS "Pod", ServiceName AS "Service", count() AS "Errors"
FROM {{LOGS_SCHEMA}}.{{LOGS_TABLE}}
WHERE (SeverityNumber >= 17 OR lower(SeverityText) IN ('error', 'fatal'))
  AND Timestamp >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND Timestamp <= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  AND $__filters
GROUP BY "Namespace", "Pod", ServiceName
ORDER BY count() DESC
LIMIT 50

onClick.whereTemplate: ResourceAttributes['k8s.namespace.name'] = '{{Namespace}}' AND ResourceAttributes['k8s.pod.name'] = '{{Pod}}' AND ServiceName = '{{Service}}' AND (SeverityNumber >= 17 OR lower(SeverityText) IN ('error','fatal'))
